reactor.name: showerhead-type ALD reactor equipped with a direct plasma generator (CN1 Atomic Premium)

otherAspects.safety: The precursor is thermally stable below ∼230 °C and has a low vapor pressure (1 Torr at 99 °C), ensuring safety during ALD.
